# frostmoln_vpc (Data Source)

Look up a VPC by ID or name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "frostmoln_vpc" "production" {
  name = "production-vpc"
}

output "vpc_cidr" {
  value = data.frostmoln_vpc.production.cidr
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the VPC. Exactly one of id or name must be specified.
- `name` (String) The name of the VPC. Exactly one of id or name must be specified.

### Read-Only

- `cidr` (String) The CIDR block of the VPC.
- `created_at` (String) The timestamp when the VPC was created.
- `description` (String) The description of the VPC.
- `is_default` (Boolean) Whether this is the default VPC.
- `region` (String) The region of the VPC.
- `status` (String) The status of the VPC.
- `subnet_count` (Number) The number of subnets in the VPC.
- `tags` (Map of String) The tags associated with the VPC.
